title: Back button walks UP every settings hierarchy
notes: Account Settings (and Privacy, Notifications, Sound, Blocked, Muted, Activity Log, Expert App, Help, Rate, Close Friends) → back returns to Settings, then to Profile, then to previous tab, then to home, then exits
Country / Phone code / Timezone pickers inside Account Settings → back returns to Account Settings (one level at a time)
Edit Profile, Avatar viewer, Avatar menu, Cover adjust, Crop, Emoji picker, Likers list → back closes the modal
Moments viewer: back closes sub-overlays first (own/other menu → share sheet → viewers list → close viewer), one level per press
Audit-agent verified 22 ProfileScreen state vars + Moments deps before ship
